title: Test router end-to-end on live oMLX node
description: Start the router against the running oMLX instance, verify /health, /v1/models, and /v1/chat/completions all work correctly with proper routing.
close_reason: Installer tested and working; e2e routing verified

title: CLI: privatenet registry list/add/remove
description: Add registry subcommand to the privatenet CLI. 'registry list' shows the current registry. 'registry add mlx-community/model-name' adds a model. 'registry remove model-name' removes it. Changes write to ~/.omlx-privatenet/registry.json.

title: Epic: Model Registry — shared model catalog across PrivateNet
description: A shared registry that defines which models the network wants available. Each node independently decides whether to download and serve them based on capacity. Models sync via peer protocol, nodes can opt into auto-download.

title: Auto-update background loop
description: Background task that checks for updates on a schedule (default: every 6 hours). Only updates when in_flight == 0. Runs: curl -fsSL .../install.sh | NONINTERACTIVE=1 bash -s -- --no-models. Configurable via auto_update setting. Default: false.

title: Security: sanitize model IDs and enforce safetensors-only
description: Reject model IDs containing path traversal chars (.., /, etc). Only auto-download repos that contain safetensors weights (not pickle/pytorch). Validate download directory stays within MODEL_DIR. Blocks auto-download task.

title: Epic: Auto-Updater — self-updating router with rollback
description: The router periodically checks GitHub for new versions and updates itself without user intervention. Includes rollback on failed health check, opt-out config, and manual trigger via CLI.

title: Model eviction: priority-based cleanup when disk fills
description: When a node's disk usage exceeds auto_download_max_gb, evict the lowest-priority models first. Registry priority field (lower = more important) determines eviction order. Models actively loaded in oMLX are never evicted. Models in the node's advertise_models allowlist are never evicted. The eviction loop: 1) sort local models by registry priority (unregistered models evict first), 2) delete lowest-priority model from disk, 3) repeat until under the cap. CLI: 'privatenet models evict --dry-run' to preview. Add a 'pinned' flag per-node so operators can protect specific models from eviction regardless of priority.

title: Installer: respect existing oMLX installations
description: The install script doesn't detect existing oMLX setups (different LaunchAgent names, existing settings.json, running processes). It would create duplicate LaunchAgents, overwrite config, and clone redundant repos. Fix to be idempotent and detect existing oMLX.
close_reason: Installer tested and working; e2e routing verified

title: Config: auto_update setting
description: Add auto_update (bool, default false) and update_interval_hours (int, default 6) to RouterConfig. Manageable via 'privatenet config set auto_update true'.

title: Security: atomic file writes for registry.json
description: Registry merge and CLI writes should use write-to-temp-then-rename pattern to prevent corruption from concurrent writes or crashes mid-write.

title: Add omlx-privatenet enable/disable CLI command
description: Ship a simple command that lets a node operator take their node out of service (drain) or bring it back. Should be a single command like 'omlx-privatenet disable' that writes a state file and causes the health endpoint to report unhealthy, so peers stop routing to it.

title: Fit check: can this node run a given model?
description: Query oMLX /v1/models/status for max_model_memory. Query HuggingFace API or oMLX /admin/api/hf/model-info for estimated model size. Return yes/no with reason. Used by auto-download to skip models that won't fit.

title: GET /v1/registry endpoint for peer sync
description: New unauthenticated endpoint on the router that returns this node's registry.json. Peers call this during health probe to exchange registries.
close_reason: Implemented: /v1/registry endpoint + merge in health probe cycle

title: Security: prominent logging and health reporting for rollbacks
description: When a rollback occurs after a failed update, log it as a warning visible in /health endpoint and privatenet status. Rollback should be temporary — next check cycle retries the latest. Don't let rollback silently reintroduce fixed vulnerabilities.

title: Security audit of PrivateNet setup
description: Review the entire setup for security vulnerabilities: installer script, router API exposure, auth flow, Tailscale trust model, file permissions, API key handling, LaunchAgent config. Ensure no unintentional attack surface.

title: Version tracking: embed version in router, VERSION file
description: Add a VERSION file to the repo root. Router reads it on startup and exposes via /health and /v1/node-info. The health probe includes version so peers can see each other's versions.

title: Update execution: re-run install script with --no-models
description: The auto-updater re-runs the install script from the latest commit on main. This handles everything: oMLX update, mlx-lm fork, router code, deps, config merge, LaunchAgent restart. Uses NONINTERACTIVE=1 and --no-models. Much simpler than manual git pull + pip install + restart.
close_reason: Implemented: update execution with oMLX + drain + CLI

title: Security: auto-updater must use git pull, not curl|bash
description: CRITICAL: The auto-updater must NOT run curl|bash unattended. Instead, git pull the managed checkout at ~/omlx-privatenet/omlx-privatenet, then run the local install script. This keeps updates within the authenticated git channel. Pin to signed tags/releases when available.

title: Config: auto_download and auto_download_max_gb settings
description: Add auto_download (bool, default false) and auto_download_max_gb (int, optional) to RouterConfig. Add 'privatenet config set/get' CLI commands for managing these.

title: Security: allowlist trusted model repos in registry
description: Registry should only accept models from trusted HuggingFace orgs (e.g. mlx-community). Validate repo exists on HuggingFace before adding. Reject typosquats. Configurable trusted_orgs list in router.json. Blocks the registry epic.

title: Auto-download loop (opt-in background task)
description: When auto_download=true in router.json, run a background loop that checks registry for missing models, runs fit check, and downloads via huggingface-cli. Respects priority ordering. Configurable max storage cap via auto_download_max_gb. Default: off.

title: registry.json data model and file operations
description: Define the registry.json schema (models array with repo, id, priority, added_by, added_at). Write helpers to load/save/merge registries. Merge strategy: union of models, latest timestamp wins for conflicts.

title: Rollback: verify health after update, re-run pinned version on failure
description: After the install script runs, wait 30s and check /health. If unhealthy, re-run the install script pinned to the previous commit SHA. Log the rollback reason. Store last-known-good SHA in ~/.omlx-privatenet/version.json.

title: Security: drain node before auto-update to prevent request failures
description: Before applying an update, the auto-updater should: 1) Set node to disabled (privatenet disable), 2) Wait for in_flight to reach 0, 3) Run the update, 4) Re-enable the node. Prevents TOCTOU gap where requests arrive between the check and restart.

title: GitHub version check: compare local vs remote
description: Function that checks GitHub API (or raw git) for the latest commit/tag on main. Compares against local VERSION. Returns (needs_update, remote_version, changelog_url).

title: CLI: privatenet update and privatenet update --check
description: Manual update trigger via CLI. 'privatenet update' pulls and applies immediately. 'privatenet update --check' just reports whether an update is available without applying. Shows current vs available version.
close_reason: Implemented: update execution with oMLX + drain + CLI

title: Registry merge in health probe cycle
description: During run_once, after probing each peer's /v1/node-info, also fetch /v1/registry. Merge remote registries into local using union + latest-wins. Write merged result back to disk.
close_reason: Implemented: /v1/registry endpoint + merge in health probe cycle

title: Security: cap registry size to prevent disk exhaustion
description: Limit registry to a configurable max number of models (default: 50). The auto_download_max_gb cap already limits disk usage, but a model count cap prevents the registry itself from being spammed.
